# AI Marketing Tools Directory

> A curated directory of the best AI-powered marketing tools for automation, analytics, content creation, and campaign optimization.

## Categories

### Content Creation
- Jasper AI: AI content creation platform for marketing teams
- Copy.ai: AI copywriting tool for marketing copy

### Marketing Automation
- HubSpot Marketing Hub: All-in-one marketing platform with AI-powered features

### SEO
- Surfer SEO: AI-powered content optimization tool

### Advertising
- AdCreative.ai: AI-powered ad creative generation

## Comparisons
- Jasper AI vs Copy.ai
- HubSpot vs Mailchimp
- Surfer SEO vs Clearscope

## About
This directory is automatically curated and updated. All data is verified and sourced from official websites and user reviews.
